script.code: if (familyName != null && basic.stringify(familyName).trim() != '') return basic.stringify(familyName).trim(); if (fullName != null && basic.stringify(fullName).trim() != '') return basic.stringify(fullName).trim(); return null
def v = (input ?: '').toString().trim().toLowerCase(); if (!v.endsWith('@upeu.edu.pe')) return null; def local = v.substring(0, v.indexOf('@')); return local ==~ /\d+/ ? null : v
switch ((gender ?: '').toString()) { case '1': return 'M'; case '2': return 'F'; default: return null }

import com.evolveum.midpoint.xml.ns._public.common.common_3.ActivationStatusType def worker = liveAffiliationWorker def student = liveAffiliationStudent def guest = smartwifiGuest def hasLib = focus?.roleMembershipRef?.any { it?.oid == '91b2cbcd-3db9-4e90-b72e-b874b3c48fa6' } def eligible = (worker != null) || (student != null) || (guest != null) || hasLib return eligible ? ActivationStatusType.ENABLED : ActivationStatusType.DISABLED

filter.name: correlate-by-dni-extended
filter.documentation: DNI del extended_attribute Koha (code='DNI', borrower_attributes) == extension/upeu:lambDocNum. Capa autoritativa: correlaciona por identificador legal inmutable. Sentinel zero-match: si el shadow NO trae un par DNI valido (8 digitos), la expression devuelve '__NO_MATCH__' -> 0 candidatos (jamas filtro vacio).

filter.name: correlate-by-cardnumber
filter.documentation: cardnumber del patron Koha == name (COD_APS / codigo de matricula UPeU) del user. Path MidPoint-managed. Sentinel zero-match: solo correlaciona si cardnumber es codigo numerico (>=8 digitos); logins, codigos G####### y cuentas de servicio (ADMIN3UPEU$, AUTOPBUL1...) -> '__NO_MATCH__'.

script.code: def cn = basic.getAttributeValue(projection, 'cardnumber') if (cn == null) return '__NO_MATCH__' cn = cn.toString().trim() return (cn ==~ /^\d{8,}$/) ? cn : '__NO_MATCH__'

filter.name: correlate-by-cardnumber-as-dni
filter.documentation: cardnumber del patron Koha (cuando ES el DNI de 8 digitos) == extension/upeu:lambDocNum. Para patrones STAFF/DOCEN legacy cuyo cardnumber es el DNI en lugar del COD_APS. Sentinel zero-match: cardnumber distinto de 8 digitos exactos -> '__NO_MATCH__'.

script.code: def cn = basic.getAttributeValue(projection, 'cardnumber') if (cn == null) return '__NO_MATCH__' cn = cn.toString().trim() return (cn ==~ /^\d{8}$/) ? cn : '__NO_MATCH__'
